categories.title: Hyperfy Development and AI Integration Updates

content.text:
### Technical Discussions & Solutions
- **Vec3 Field Implementation:** A new `vec3` field type for rotation and scale was proposed and confirmed useful.
- **Rideable Entities:** Expanding rideable raptors to include rideable people was suggested.
- **Docker PostgreSQL Remote Access:** Exposing the port was confirmed as the only viable solution.
- **Butterfly Rotation Issue:** Using an empty object in Blender was suggested to simplify transformations.
- **CPU-Based Particle System:** A new system supporting collision was introduced to reduce reliance on UI nodes.
- **Math Functions Bug Fix:** A fix was pushed to enable all Math functions.
- **GLB Collision Issue:** A server-side error was confirmed but did not crash the world.
- **Procedural Terrain Generation:** Perlin noise was used to dynamically update vertices.
- **Idle Camera System:** A setup for cinematic panning was explained.
- **Queue System for Matchmaking:** A `player.route('instance')` function was suggested instead of an external queue server.
- **Three.js Primitive Creation:** A function for easier primitive generation was proposed.
- **Hypkg for Mod Sharing:** `hypkg` was promoted for easy deployment of modded cores.
- **Docker Build Issue with Solana:** Switching to `node:22` resolved an issue with Alpine-based Docker images.
- **Avatar Swap Hyp Fix:** A function swap was needed to fix a broken Avatar Swap Hyp.

### AI and MCP Server Updates
- **AI Agent Guides Update:** AI-related guides on Hyperfy are being updated, including AI agents and coding AI.
- **MCP Server Issue:** Troubleshooting is ongoing for MCP server functionality with the Claude desktop interface.
- **Voice Synthesis Research:** Research on overcoming the 'uncanny valley' in voice synthesis was shared.

### Hyperfy V1 Optimization & AI-Generated Assets
- **Instancing in Hyperfy V1:** Textures do not auto-instance, requiring manual instancing via Blender and `@gltf-transform/functions`.
- **AI-Generated Textures:** Krea.ai was used for cyberpunk facades, with discussions on color grading and blending.
- **Discord Webhook for Hyperfy:** A method to broadcast messages from the server to Discord was shared, with a bug fix in progress.

### Model App & Avatar Marketplace
- **Model App with GLB Support:** A model app was developed to import `.glb` files with collision and scale toggles.
- **Non-Humanoid Rig Workaround:** A workaround for non-humanoid rigs was suggested using Blender and scripting.
- **Avatar Marketplace Resources:** Multiple avatar asset marketplaces were shared and added to the Hyperfy guide.
- **NFT Avatar Collections:** A table listing NFT avatar projects was proposed, with a related GitHub repository found.
- **UV Scroll Test:** A UV scrolling effect was demonstrated using a seamless alpha texture.
